name: Satya Aesthetics & Hair Solutions - Delhi
rationale: Bullets explicitly and consistently self-report operating clinics in both Delhi and Gurugram/Gurgaon -- a legitimate multi-branch claim, not misattributed evidence. Flags a scope gap: Tier A's binary city-match can't distinguish 'genuinely multi-city' from 'contaminated'.

name: Anantshree Hospital

name: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences
rationale: Same 'Care Hospital' cardiac-imaging / dual-source-CT bullets found verbatim in Rela Hospital's record (a different facility, different city) -- this is not isolated noise, it is the same contamination pattern recurring across at least two unrelated facilities in this 25-row sample.

name: Nahar Medical Centre
rationale: Andheri East is a Mumbai neighborhood (own city, not foreign). The two other org names read as visiting/hosted specialist clinics within the medical centre, a common Indian multi-specialty arrangement, not clear misattribution.

rationale: Allahabad is the pre-2018 name of Prayagraj -- same city under its old name, not a foreign city. A clean example of why alias/rename resolution matters for the 'principled' Stage 3 pass.
